1.arabic: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم يسبح لله ما في السماوات وما في الأرض ۖ له الملك وله الحمد ۖ وهو على كل شيء قدير
1.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs [all] praise, and He is over all things competent.
1.transliteration: Yusabbihu lillaahi maa fis samaawaati wa maa fil ardi lahul mulku wa lahul hamd, wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shai 'in Qadeer

1.arabic: هو الذي خلقكم فمنكم كافر ومنكم مؤمن ۚ والله بما تعملون بصير
1.english: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.
1.transliteration: Huwal lazee khalaqakum faminkum kaafirunw wa min kum mu'min ; wallaahu bimaa ta'maloona Baseer

1.arabic: خلق السماوات والأرض بالحق وصوركم فأحسن صوركم ۖ وإليه المصير
1.english: He created the heavens and earth in truth and formed you and perfected your forms; and to Him is the [final] destination.
1.transliteration: Khalaqas samaawaati wal arda bilhaqqi wa sawwarakum fa ahsana suwarakum wa ilaihil maseer

1.arabic: يعلم ما في السماوات والأرض ويعلم ما تسرون وما تعلنون ۚ والله عليم بذات الصدور
1.english: He knows what is within the heavens and earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare. And Allah is Knowing of that within the breasts.
1.transliteration: Ya'lamu maa fis samaawaati wal ardi wa ya'lamu maa tusirroona wa maa tu'linoon; wallaahu 'Aleemum bizaatis sudoor

1.arabic: ألم يأتكم نبأ الذين كفروا من قبل فذاقوا وبال أمرهم ولهم عذاب أليم
1.english: Has there not come to you the news of those who disbelieved before? So they tasted the bad consequence of their affair, and they will have a painful punishment.
1.transliteration: Alam yaatikum naba'ul lazeena kafaroo min qablu fazaaqoo wabaala amrihim wa lahum 'azaabun aleem

1.arabic: ذلك بأنه كانت تأتيهم رسلهم بالبينات فقالوا أبشر يهدوننا فكفروا وتولوا ۚ واستغنى الله ۚ والله غني حميد
1.english: That is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences, but they said, "Shall human beings guide us?" and disbelieved and turned away. And Allah dispensed [with them]; and Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy.
1.transliteration: Zaalika bi annahoo kaanat taateehim Rusuluhum bilbaiyinaati faqaaloo a basharuny yahdoonanaa fakafaroo wa tawallaw; wastaghnal laah; wallaahu ghaniyyun hameed

1.arabic: زعم الذين كفروا أن لن يبعثوا ۚ قل بلى وربي لتبعثن ثم لتنبؤن بما عملتم ۚ وذلك على الله يسير
1.english: Those who disbelieve have claimed that they will never be resurrected. Say, "Yes, by my Lord, you will surely be resurrected; then you will surely be informed of what you did. And that, for Allah, is easy."
1.transliteration: Za'amal lazeena kafarooo al-lany yub'asoo; qul balaa wa rabbee latub'asunna summa latunabba'unna bimaa 'amiltum; wa zaalika 'alal laahi yaseer

1.arabic: فآمنوا بالله ورسوله والنور الذي أنزلنا ۚ والله بما تعملون خبير
1.english: So believe in Allah and His Messenger and the Qur'an which We have sent down. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
1.transliteration: Fa-aaminoo billaahi wa rasoolihee wannooril lazeee anzalnaa; wallaahu bima ta'maloona khabeer

1.arabic: يوم يجمعكم ليوم الجمع ۖ ذلك يوم التغابن ۗ ومن يؤمن بالله ويعمل صالحا يكفر عنه سيئاته ويدخله جنات تجري من تحتها الأنهار خالدين فيها أبدا ۚ ذلك الفوز العظيم
1.english: The Day He will assemble you for the Day of Assembly - that is the Day of Deprivation. And whoever believes in Allah and does righteousness - He will remove from him his misdeeds and admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever. That is the great attainment.
1.transliteration: Ywma yajma'ukum li yawmil jam'i zaalika yawmut taghaabun; wa many-yumim billaahi wa ya'mal saalihany yukaffir 'anhu sayyi aatihee wa yudkhilhu jannaatin tajree min tahtihal anhaaru khaalideena feehaaa abadaa; zaalikal fawzul 'azeem

1.arabic: والذين كفروا وكذبوا بآياتنا أولئك أصحاب النار خالدين فيها ۖ وبئس المصير
1.english: But the ones who disbelieved and denied Our verses - those are the companions of the Fire, abiding eternally therein; and wretched is the destination.
1.transliteration: Wallazeena kafaroo wa kazzaboo bi aayaaatinaaa ulaaa'ika ashaabun naari khaalideena feehaa bi'sal maseer

1.arabic: ما أصاب من مصيبة إلا بإذن الله ۗ ومن يؤمن بالله يهد قلبه ۚ والله بكل شيء عليم
1.english: No disaster strikes except by permission of Allah. And whoever believes in Allah - He will guide his heart. And Allah is Knowing of all things.
1.transliteration: Maaa asaaba mim musee batin illaa bi-iznil laah; wa many yu'mim billaahi yahdi qalbah; wallaahu bikulli shai;in Aleem

1.arabic: وأطيعوا الله وأطيعوا الرسول ۚ فإن توليتم فإنما على رسولنا البلاغ المبين
1.english: And obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon Our Messenger is only [the duty of] clear notification.
1.transliteration: Wa atee'ul laaha wa atee'ur Rasool; fa in tawallaitum fa innamaa 'alaa Rasoolinal balaaghul mubeen

1.arabic: الله لا إله إلا هو ۚ وعلى الله فليتوكل المؤمنون
1.english: Allah - there is no deity except Him. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
1.transliteration: Allaahu laaa ilaaha illaa Hoo; wa 'alal laahi falyata wakkalil mu'minoon

1.arabic: يا أيها الذين آمنوا إن من أزواجكم وأولادكم عدوا لكم فاحذروهم ۚ وإن تعفوا وتصفحوا وتغفروا فإن الله غفور رحيم
1.english: O you who have believed, indeed, among your wives and your children are enemies to you, so beware of them. But if you pardon and overlook and forgive - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
1.transliteration: Yaaa ayyuhal lazeena aamanooo inna min azwaaji kum wa awlaadikum 'aduwwal lakum fahzaroohum; wa in ta'foo wa tasfahoo wa taghfiroo fa innal laaha ghafoorur Raheem

1.arabic: إنما أموالكم وأولادكم فتنة ۚ والله عنده أجر عظيم
1.english: Your wealth and your children are but a trial, and Allah has with Him a great reward.
1.transliteration: Innamaa amwaalukum wa awlaadukum fitnah; wallaahu 'indahooo ajrun 'azeem

1.arabic: فاتقوا الله ما استطعتم واسمعوا وأطيعوا وأنفقوا خيرا لأنفسكم ۗ ومن يوق شح نفسه فأولئك هم المفلحون
1.english: So fear Allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend [in the way of Allah]; it is better for your selves. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful.
1.transliteration: Fattaqul laaha mastat'tum wasma'oo wa atee'oo waanfiqoo khairal li anfusikum; wa many-yooqa shuha nafsihee fa-ulaaa'ika humul muflihoon

1.arabic: إن تقرضوا الله قرضا حسنا يضاعفه لكم ويغفر لكم ۚ والله شكور حليم
1.english: If you loan Allah a goodly loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you. And Allah is Most Appreciative and Forbearing.
1.transliteration: In tuqridul laaha qardan hasanany yudd'ifhu lakum wa yaghfir lakum; wallaahu Shakoorun Haleem

1.english: Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
